mechanism: Maturity-dependent correlation bifurcation means front-end negative UST-SPX correlation gives false hedging assurance while long-end positive correlation compounds losses. Carry portfolios hedged with short-end rates appear diversified but are exposed to correlated losses at the long end during positioning unwinds.
regime_dependence: Novel regime with only one historical precedent (late 2005-2006); absent in 2022 (unified inflation) and 2017-2019 (standard disinflation)
